title: Sintra, Lisboa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Sintra, Lisboa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Sintra is a city in Lisboa with a population of 385,606. A UNESCO World Heritage town with fairy-tale palaces, lush forests, and a romantic mountain setting near Lisbon.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
